VSAT.Module.Title: State-Aware Tokens
VSAT.Settings.CoexistenceMode.Name: Coexistence Mode
VSAT.Settings.CoexistenceMode.Hint: How to behave when another module (Token Variants Art, Visage, ATL) is also managing this token's image. 'Defer' yields image control to them; 'Clobber' overrides; 'Warn' notifies the GM once.
VSAT.Settings.AnimationDuration.Name: Default Animation Duration
VSAT.Settings.AnimationDuration.Hint: Cross-fade duration in milliseconds when swapping token images. Set to 0 for instant snap (recommended for animated webm tokens).
VSAT.Settings.EnabledForNonGMOwners.Name: Enable for Player-Owned Tokens
VSAT.Settings.EnabledForNonGMOwners.Hint: If enabled, players will see swaps for tokens they own. Disabled by default — GMs see all swaps regardless.
VSAT.Settings.AppliedPack.Name: Active Preset Pack
VSAT.Settings.AppliedPack.Hint: A bundle of states with sensible priorities. The Recommended CPR Combat Pack is auto-applied for Cyberpunk Red Core.
VSAT.Settings.DebugLogging.Name: Debug Logging
VSAT.Settings.DebugLogging.Hint: Verbose console logging for state changes, predicate evaluation, and swap decisions.
VSAT.Settings.Menu.Name: Module Settings
VSAT.Settings.Menu.Label: Configure
VSAT.Settings.Menu.Hint: Open the State-Aware Tokens settings dialog (state pack management, debug, coexistence).
VSAT.ActorConfig.Title: State-Aware Tokens — {actor}
VSAT.ActorConfig.NoStates.Title: No States Registered
VSAT.ActorConfig.NoStates.Hint: No states have been registered. Apply a preset pack from the module settings, or have a system shim register states for your game system.
VSAT.ActorConfig.Disabled.Name: Disable for this actor
VSAT.ActorConfig.Disabled.Hint: Skip state-driven swaps entirely for this actor.
VSAT.ActorConfig.PreviewHint: Drag tokens of this actor to a scene to test the configured states.
VSAT.SettingsApp.Title: State-Aware Tokens — Settings
VSAT.Notification.LibWrapperMissing: State-Aware Tokens requires the libWrapper module. Please install and activate it.
VSAT.Notification.CoexistenceWarn: Detected token managed by {module} on {count} token(s). State-Aware Tokens will defer image control. See module settings to change.
VSAT.Notification.NoSystemShim: No system shim found for '{system}'. Some predicates may not work. Check the module documentation.
VSAT.State.bloodied.Description: Token is at half HP or below.
VSAT.State.wounded.Description: Token has taken damage but is above the bloodied threshold.
VSAT.State.inCombat.Description: Token is currently in active combat.
VSAT.State.cpr.dead.Description: CPR: actor explicitly marked as Dead.
VSAT.State.cpr.rolling.deathSave.Descrip: CPR: a death save is in progress.
VSAT.State.cpr.rolling.stat.Description: CPR: rolling a stat check (REF, BODY, etc.).
VSAT.State.cpr.rolling.role.Description: CPR: rolling a role / interface ability.
VSAT.State.cpr.rolling.skill.Description: CPR: rolling a skill check (any skill).
